name: is_prime
description: Check whether a given integer is prime.

n.description: The integer to test for primality.

name: nth_prime
description: Return the n-th prime number (1-indexed: nth_prime(1)=2, nth_prime(2)=3, ...).

name: factorize
description: Return the prime factorization of a positive integer as a sorted list of (prime, exponent) pairs.
